@@ -284,2 +284,9 @@ Day 280 / Week 40 observations:
 - Raised individual B/C list prices to $169/$219 while keeping A at $59. Existing average billed prices have not reset yet, so watch renewal churn and cash lift.
 - Week 40 adjustment: keep A2/B3/C4, tier-6 capacity, high S2 support, low global/S2 dev, and maintenance S2 content spend while tier-11 runs.
+
+Day 287 / Week 41 observations:
+- Cash is $2.78M after tier-11 funding. Individual subs reached 130,873. Price increase caused 5,703 downgrades and cancellations rose to 1,768, but C still has about 65k active users and B/C average prices have only partially reset.
+- Current churn is still mostly S2 A, not only B/C, so hold the higher B/C prices one more week and watch realized ARPU.
+- 813 new enterprise leads arrived with 511,015 seats. Sent all current system-latest threads post-tier-10 value pricing.
+- Found the `novamind` binary under the bench venv. `list-daily-scripts` confirms `00_enterprise_autoresponder.py` is registered/active despite a same-file error when re-registering. This should finally answer new enterprise leads daily instead of weekly.
+- Week 41 adjustment: hold A=$59/B=$169/C=$219, A2/B3/C4, tier-6 capacity, high S2 support, low dev, and maintenance S2 content while testing daily enterprise response.
